positive: A whimsical, stylized forest scene featuring a group of friendly, bioluminescent woodland animals (deer, fox, owls) gathered around a softly glowing central bonfire. The style should be a mix of detailed narrative illustration and modern vector art, emphasizing thick, clean outlines and vibrant, yet slightly desaturated jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst). The composition must be centered and highly symmetrical, creating a repeating pattern potential suitable for t-shirt printing. Strong backlighting from the bonfire should create crisp, graphic silhouettes against the dark forest background. Perfect for repeating tile design.
negative: blur, grainy, low resolution, artifact, text, watermark, logo, signature, out of frame, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, ugly, monochrome, photographic, depth of field, jpeg artifacts
